animation.round_start: Round {{round}} starts: Assume Index {{i}} is the minimum
animation.compare_true: Compare: Is Index {{j}} ({{scanVal}}) less than current minimum ({{minVal}})? -> True
animation.compare_false: Compare: Is Index {{j}} ({{scanVal}}) less than current minimum ({{minVal}})? -> False
animation.update_min: Found a smaller value! Update minimum index to {{minIdx}}
animation.swap_true: Swap: Exchange minimum of this round (Index {{minIdx}}) with Index {{i}}
animation.swap_false: Index {{i}} is already the minimum, no swap needed
